tactical_shape: Intense, aggressive, high-possession approach with purpose
Full-backs very high, especially Pedro Porro and Marc Cucurella
Controlled the game through Rodri in midfield and Pedri/Olmo finding spaces
Pressed and counter-pressed aggressively, with even Lamine Yamal tracking back to help defend
standout_players: Lamine Yamal: scored inside 10 minutes on first start since hamstring injury; lively, contagious influence, withdrawn at half-time to be protected
Mikel Oyarzabal: 2 goals and 1 assist in the first 23 minutes; praise for his overall output, 14 goals and 7 assists in his past 13 Spain games
Rodri: controlled the game, completing 113 passes
Álex Baena: neat outside-of-the-boot pass for the opener and an impact from the start
Dani Olmo: found spaces and helped create the third goal
Marc Cucurella: forced the fourth goal and was part of the high full-back threat
Pedro Porro: curling cross contributed to the third goal
Aymeric Laporte: provided clarity from a chaotic corner with the knockdown for Oyarzabal's second
fatigue_injuries: Lamine Yamal was making his first start since a hamstring injury in April and was taken off after 45 minutes to be protected
Mikel Oyarzabal was also withdrawn at half-time because his work was done
De la Fuente made changes to protect players and give minutes to others
home_read.momentum: Spain answered the criticism from the opening draw in emphatic style, looking like themselves again and generating strong momentum after a dominant, confidence-restoring win.

tactical_shape: Struggled to cope with Spain's intensity and high-possession game
Unable to deal with Spain's wide play and set-piece situations
Made a mess of a corner for Spain's second goal
standout_players: Salem al-Dawsari: the main Saudi outlet, briefly led a rare attack before halftime
Mohammed al-Owais: beaten for Spain's chances, including Oyarzabal's shot off the bar
fatigue_injuries: The side looked tired by half-time
away_read.momentum: A heavy defeat and an inability to find a way through left Saudi Arabia with a damaging setback and little positive narrative from the match.
